problem_statement: Build a basic tokenizer that splits Pokémon attack descriptions into individual word tokens.
code_with_blanks:
def tokenize_moves(description):
    # Split the Pokémon move description into tokens
    tokens = description.___('  ')
    
    # Convert all tokens to lowercase
    clean_tokens = [token.___ for token in tokens]
    
    # Remove empty strings
    final_tokens = [t for t in clean_tokens if t != ___]
    
    return final_tokens

# Test with Pikachu's Thunderbolt
move_desc = "Pikachu uses THUNDERBOLT with great power"
result = tokenize_moves(move_desc)
print(result)
